input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 1.1.5 tests cover TypedActor/TypedProps, but those classes are absent from pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; tests must be adapted to APIs still present rather than adding another artifact to mask the removal.
Pekko documentation lists pekko-testkit for conventional actor testing, but it is not required to exercise core pekko-actor behavior and adding it would broaden the scope beyond the target artifact.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, or environment/system property is required for meaningful org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1 coverage. The resolved artifact has only scala-library and Typesafe Config runtime dependencies and contains the classic actor APIs needed for standalone tests. The observed failure is caused by stale tests using removed org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor/TypedProps APIs, not missing setup.
